ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leas" (
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LEA */,
  "lea_name" TEXT /* Name of the LEA */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the LEA */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the LEA */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the LEA */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Contact address for the LEA */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Total population size of the LEA */,
  "demographic_info" TEXT /* Demographic information of the LEA */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the LEA */,
  "budget_allocation" TEXT /* Details of budget allocation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA the school belongs to */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., primary, secondary, special) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the school */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Contact address for the school */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "student_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic breakdown of students in the school */,
  "number_of_classrooms" INTEGER /* Number of classrooms in the school */,
  "number_of_libraries" INTEGER /* Number of libraries in the school */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_lea_id FOREIGN KEY ("lea_id") REFERENCES leas ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the instructor is assigned to */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the instructor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the instructor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the instructor */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Educational qualifications and certifications of the instructor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the instructor */,
  "previous_employment" TEXT /* Previous employment history of the instructor */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding allocation */,
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA receiving the funding */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated */,
  "funding_year" INTEGER /* Year the funding was allocated */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., operational, capital) */,
  "funding_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_lea_id FOREIGN KEY ("lea_id") REFERENCES leas ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., GCSE pass rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., standardized test, internal assessment) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lea_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average GCSE pass rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., standardized test, internal assessment) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lea_metrics_lea_id FOREIGN KEY ("lea_id") REFERENCES leas ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_instructor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the instructor is assigned to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "assignment_year" INTEGER /* Year the assignment was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., teacher, principal) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_instructor_assignments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_instructor_assignments_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lea_schools" (
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA */,
  "school_count" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the LEA */,
  "instructor_count" INTEGER /* Number of instructors in the LEA */,
  "average_metric_value" REAL /* Average value of a specific metric (e.g., GCSE pass rate) */,
  "average_attendance" REAL /* Average attendance rate across schools in the LEA */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate across schools in the LEA */,
  "average_years_experience" REAL /* Average years of experience of instructors in the LEA */,
  "certification_rate" REAL /* Certification rate of instructors in the LEA */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device used */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lea_id FOREIGN KEY ("lea_id") REFERENCES leas ("lea_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_definitions" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., academic, administrative) */,
  "metric_units" TEXT /* Units of the metric (e.g., percentage, number of students) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA receiving the funding */,
  "funding_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., operational, capital) */,
  "funding_program" TEXT /* Funding program (e.g., federal grant, state grant) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_lea_id FOREIGN KEY ("lea_id") REFERENCES leas ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "school_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_subjects" (
  "instructor_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor-subject combination */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject taught */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_subjects_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lea_performance" (
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LEA */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was measured */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., standardized test, internal assessment) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lea_id", "metric_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was measured */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data (e.g., standardized test, internal assessment) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id", "metric_name")
)
